violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -Listed CSFM no longer at this facility. *Both staff members on-site stated they have a CFSM certificate but did not have documentation available at time of inspection.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Not all open deli meats in display case and in online prep table are used within 24 hours (i.e. cappacuolo and proscuittini).

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Sliced tomatoes at make line found with temperature of 50F. -Sliced tomatoes online make line found with temperatures fo 48-51F in top layer. *May need to use lids and deep pans to maintain temperatures at make lines (Units ambient temperatures were at or below 39F).

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet cloth left at counter next to register and next to slicer between uses. -Wet cloth hanging on hook below slicer below slicer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at handles of prep table and drawers. -Grease build up in cabinet below flat top.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
